# AIScripter

AIScripter is a browser-based AI-powered funscript generation tool. Users describe or upload content and the AI generates haptic scripts compatible with The Handy device and other funscript-capable devices.

## Public entry points

- https://hapticos.replit.app/aiscripter/ — AIScripter home (script generation interface)

## Notes

AIScripter is served under the /aiscripter/ path. The application is a single-page app — the entry point above is the only public URL. All script generation and AI interactions happen in-browser after loading that page.
